scripts.build:app: killall Blitz || true && bash scripts/bundle.sh release && open .build/Blitz.app
scripts.release-tag: npm version patch && npm run build:app && npm run build:pkg && npm run deploy
scripts.release: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && npm run build:app && npm run build:pkg && npm run deploy
scripts.bundle:all: sudo rm -rf build && npm run build:pkg && sudo pkill -f blitz-postinstall 2>/dev/null; sudo installer -pkg build/Blitz-*.pkg -target / -verbose && cat /tmp/blitz_install.log && open /Applications/Blitz.app
